underlying_goal: Fix expense update bugs in a Travel Planner FastAPI app, then iteratively add features including labels, activities, destinations improvements, and a new Journey model with timeline view
friction_detail: Initial fix attempt for date/cancel_by_date schema issue required multiple iterations (future annotations didn't work, needed type alias), and server restart wasn't suggested immediately.
brief_summary: User needed to fix expense update bugs (date type shadowing issue) and add multiple features (labels, activities, journeys, timeline) to a Travel Planner app; most tasks were completed successfully with the Journey feature still in progress.
